{{Quote|Step back or be hurt!|Uggo|<ref name="SWG:ToOW">''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Trials of Obi-Wan]]''</ref>}}
'''Uggo''' was a surly [[Whiphid/Legends|Whiphid]] present in the recreational area of the [[Mensix Mining Facility/Legends|Mensix Mining Facility]] on [[Mustafar/Legends|Mustafar]], sometime during the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]]. He possessed little intellect and couldn't speak [[Galactic Basic Standard/Legends|Basic]] very well, making him easily susceptible to scams.

==Behind the scenes==
Uggo appeared as a non-player character in the video game Star Wars Galaxies, a massively multiplayer online roleplaying game developed by [[Sony]] and published by LucasArts, prior to its closure on [[December 15]], [[2011]].

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars Galaxies: Trials of Obi-Wan]]'' {{1st}}
